_description: Final estimates -- Canada vs Morocco R16 2026-07-04

questions.question: Will Jonathan David (Canada) score a goal (excluding own goals) in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will Achraf Hakimi (Morocco) score or assist a goal (excluding own goals) in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will Alphonso Davies (Canada) have 1 or more shots on target in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will the match be decided by a penalty shootout?
Will Brahim Díaz (Morocco) have 1 or more shots on target in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will exactly 1 goal be scored in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will the match be tied at halftime?
Will there be 4 or more total cards shown in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will Ismael Saibari (Morocco) score a goal (excluding own goals) in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will Canada have 4 or more shots on target in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
questions.margin_note: Revised from 0.68 per STRATEGIC_MARGIN_PUSH_RESEARCH.md §8.2 -- de-shrunk from a 30/70 market/empirical blend to 20/80, since this is a Tier-A (4-for-4 consistent empirical) signal that warrants minimal shrinkage toward the thin market line, not a confidence-based push past true belief.

questions.question: Will Morocco have more corner kicks than Canada in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will a penalty kick be awarded OR a red card be shown in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will a goal be scored before the first hydration break?
Will both teams score in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will Morocco advance to the quarterfinals?
